hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'
hooks.description: Hook 1: Desktop notification when Claude is idle

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && { ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; } || true
hooks.description: Hook 2: Auto ruff+black on Python file edits

hooks.command: cat | jq -c --arg ts "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" '{timestamp: $ts, command: .tool_input.command, exit_code: .tool_response.exit_code}' >> ~/.claude/audit.log 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.description: Hook 5: Audit log all bash commands
Hook 3: Block edits to protected files (.env, *.pem, credentials, etc.)
Hook 4: Block dangerous bash commands (rm -rf /, sudo rm, curl|bash, etc.)
Hook 8: Validate SQL before MCP PostgreSQL queries
Hook 7: Re-inject project context after compaction

hooks.command: echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Session ended" >> ~/.claude/session-log.txt && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && git diff --stat HEAD >> ~/.claude/session-log.txt 2>/dev/null || true
